description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular wooden body with a single front-facing drawer, finished in a warm, natural wood grain. The drawer is equipped with a simple, rectangular recessed handle in a dark color, providing a minimalist and modern look. The nightstand is elevated by four slender, black metal legs that cross in an X-pattern, giving it a contemporary and airy appearance. The drawer is partially open in the side views, revealing a spacious interior suitable for storing small personal items. The top surface is flat and broad, ideal for placing lamps, books, or decorative objects. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing a clean and functional design.
description: A modern wooden nightstand with a single drawer, recessed handle, and black metal X-frame legs. The design is minimalist and functional, with a warm wood finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open drawer with a recessed handle and the X-frame metal legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the partially open drawer and the smooth wooden side panel.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back and the intersecting metal legs.
description_view_3: Right side view with the drawer partially open and the uninterrupted wood grain side.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
